content.text: Welcome to the RobCo Migrator Tool.
This utility safely scans your current save file for dynamically injected items inside Leveled Lists, allowing you to convert them to RobCo Patcher formats.
1. [ HARD SAVE REQUIRED ] Make a hard save of your game right now.
2. Click ONE of the 'Generate' buttons below. If this is your first time running this, all 3 buttons do exactly the same thing.
3. Alt-Tab out of Fallout 4 and review the generated .ini file in Data/F4SE/Plugins/RobCo_Patcher/...
4. If the file looks correct, click 'I've reviewed the ini file...', then click '[ REVERT ALL LISTS ]'.
5. [ NEW SLOT REQUIRED ] Immediately save your game into a NEW slot.
6. [ EXIT TO DESKTOP ] Do not keep playing. Load the new save normally.

content.help: Use this when generating the first time, or if you've played for a while and want to update the file for new injections. Scans and safely merges new items into the existing list.

content.text: Generate: Rename old ini file to .old
content.help: Use this if you never called revert last time and want to generate a new file. Safely tucks away the old INI file with a timestamp (.old) and creates a completely fresh scan.

content.text: Generate: Rename old ini file with timestamp with .ini extension
content.help: Use this if you prefer separate INI files so that you can review only the 'new' additions. Creates a new timestamped file alongside the old ones.

content.text: I've reviewed the ini file and am ready to revert
content.help: Safety toggle. You must click this to unlock the Revert button below for this session.
Purges all dynamic injections from your save file's RAM. MUST generate a patch and unlock the toggle first.
